title: Evolve delegation inherits ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, breaking claude.ai login auth
source_context: prometheus evolve --max-applies 29 run on 2026-07-02; 2 auth failures, 2 timeouts at 600s, 1 false-success
description: During evolve cycle 8, apply-Morty subprocesses failed for PROM-121/130 with 'claude.ai connectors are disabled because ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or another auth source is set'. The key is exported in ~/.zshenv, so every claude -p subprocess silently switches from Pro Max login to API-key billing, and in this case failed delegation outright. Evolve/delegate should strip ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (or make auth source explicit) when spawning claude -p, and surface auth-source in the failure message.
proposed_changes: Pass env={k:v for k,v in os.environ.items() if k != 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'} to subprocess.run for claude -p calls, or add a configurable env_blocklist in config.json
